title: Oil Edges Up After Plunging on Optimism Over US-Iran Agreement
summary: Oil inched higher after plummeting on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” with Iran.

title: Bridging Finance Founder David Sharpe Seeks New Appeal in Fraud Case
summary: The former chief executive officer of private credit shop Bridging Finance Inc. will ask Ontario’s highest court to review a fresh ruling that upheld fraud findings against him.

title: Asian Stocks to Rise as Nvidia Whipsaws on Results: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian equities were set to climb Thursday after gains on Wall Street that reflected a constructive outlook for US-Iran talks. Nvidia Corp. shares whipsawed in a lukewarm response to rising data center sales.

title: Samsung, TSMC Spur Reality Check After Historic AI Stock Boom
summary: Samsung and TSMC are leading a historic AI stock boom reshaping Korea and Taiwan. It's also raising questions about who benefits.

title: SpaceX Files for IPO Showing $4.28 Billion Quarterly Loss
summary: SpaceX filed publicly for its initial public offering, revealing billions in losses and the super-voting share plan allowing Elon Musk to keep the rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence giant under his control, and prevent him from being removed from power against his will.
